title: validate-gate.sh: artifact-chain enforcement at step boundaries

dod.criterion: Gate config covers all pipeline steps from brainstorm artifact table
Each step specifies: artifact path pattern, required JSON fields, weight-skip rules
Weight classes each have correct skip sets matching brainstorm
.skip marker file convention documented
Script accepts (directive-dir, target-step) and reads directive.json for weight
For each prerequisite step, checks artifact file existence
JSON artifacts validated for required fields via jq
Per-task gates: execute gate checks build-{task-id}.md, review gate checks review-{task-id}.md
Weight-conditional steps accept .skip marker files
Output is JSON: {valid, violations[], step, directive}

tasks.title: Gate script writes to directive.json on pass

dod.criterion: On valid result, writes gates.{step} = {passed_at, validated_artifacts} into directive.json
directive.json updated atomically (write to tmp then mv)
Existing directive.json fields preserved
On invalid result, directive.json NOT modified
validate-cast.sh jq queries use .projects[] instead of .initiatives[]
Removed .projects[].initiatives[] nested path (old multi-project format)
All 19 initiative references replaced with project/task as appropriate
Script passes with new-format morgan-plan.json
At least 6 test fixture directories covering different weight classes and failure modes
Test runner script exercises all fixtures and reports pass/fail
Tests cover: valid lightweight with .skip, valid heavyweight, missing brainstorm (fail), missing review (fail), valid completion gate
Test runner exits 0 when all pass, exits 1 with details on failure
